summary: Tested document upload feature for Employment Application Form and Employment Agreement. All features working: 4 document upload fields in Application Form (Aadhar, PAN, Qualification Certificate, Guardian Consent), Documents tab with checkboxes in Agreement form, backend upload endpoint working, and ANNEXURE A showing document status in PDF preview.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/employment-applications - Creates application successfully (returns ID)
Backend: POST /api/employment-applications/{id}/upload - Uploads Aadhar Card document (PDF)
Backend: POST /api/employment-applications/{id}/upload - Uploads PAN Card document (PNG)
Backend: POST /api/employment-applications/{id}/upload - Uploads Qualification Certificate (JPG)
Backend: POST /api/employment-applications/{id}/upload - Uploads Guardian Consent Letter (PDF)
Backend: GET /api/employment-applications/{id}/documents - Returns all 4 uploaded documents
Backend: POST /api/employment-applications/{id}/upload - Rejects invalid file type (TXT) with 400
Backend: POST /api/employment-agreements - Creates agreement with documents field
Backend: GET /api/employment-agreements/{id} - Returns agreement with documents field
Backend: PUT /api/employment-agreements/{id} - Updates documents checkboxes
Frontend: Employment Application Form has 'Upload Documents' section with header and description
Frontend: Aadhar Card upload field with 'Choose Aadhar Card' button visible
Frontend: PAN Card upload field with 'Choose PAN Card' button visible
Frontend: Qualification Certificate upload field with 'Choose Certificate' button visible
Frontend: Guardian/Father Consent Letter upload field with 'Choose Consent Letter' button visible
Frontend: Employment Agreements page loads with list of agreements
Frontend: New Agreement modal has 6 tabs: Company, Employee, Compensation, Terms, Penalty, Documents
Frontend: Documents tab shows 'Attached Documents Checklist' header
Frontend: Documents tab has 4 checkboxes for all document types
Frontend: Agreement Preview modal shows full agreement content
Frontend: ANNEXURE A: ATTACHED DOCUMENTS section visible in PDF preview
Frontend: Documents table shows S.No, Document Type, Status columns
Frontend: Document status shows ✓ Submitted for submitted documents
critical_code_review_comments: Good: EmploymentApplicationForm.js has dedicated Upload Documents section (lines 830-955)
Good: File type validation on frontend (PDF, JPG, PNG allowed, max 5MB)
Good: Backend upload endpoint properly validates content_type and stores in /app/uploads/applications/{id}/
Good: EmploymentAgreementsPage.js has Documents tab with checkboxes (lines 1291-1367)
Good: Agreement PDF template includes ANNEXURE A showing document status (lines 607-645)
Good: Documents stored both as files and with metadata in application_documents collection
seed_data_creation: Created test application 'TEST_Document_Upload_User' and test agreement with documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document upload feature for Employment Application Form and Employment Agreement fully verified. Employment Application Form (via Employees page > Apps tab > New Application) has Upload Documents section with 4 file upload fields. Employment Agreement (via Employment Agreements page > New Agreement) has Documents tab with 4 checkboxes. Agreement PDF preview shows ANNEXURE A with document status table. Backend endpoints /api/employment-applications/{id}/upload and /api/employment-applications/{id}/documents working correctly.

employment_application_form.location: Employees page > Apps tab > New Application

upload_documents_section.description: Upload Aadhar Card, PAN Card, Qualification Certificate, and Guardian Consent Letter (PDF, JPG, PNG - Max 5MB each)

documents_tab.description: Mark the documents that have been submitted by the employee. This will be included in the agreement PDF.

pdf_preview.document_status_table: Shows S.No, Document Type, Status columns with ✓ Submitted for submitted docs
